scenarios.description: clone() returns a deep copy with independent outputSettings, parser, and child nodes
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is not the same instance as original; returned.outputSettings != original.outputSettings; returned.parser != original.parser; returned.childNodes are distinct instances with equal content

scenarios.description: clone() propagates exception when parser.clone() throws RuntimeException
scenarios.precondition: Document d = new Document("",""); d.parser(new Parser(){ @Override public Parser clone(){throw new RuntimeException("fail");}}); // stub parser to simulate failure
